## 🔍 Severity

- [ ] 🔴 Critical - System is unusable
- [ ] 🟠 High - Major feature broken
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Feature partially working
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Minor issue or cosmetic

## 🧪 Reproducibility

- [ ] Always reproducible
- [ ] Sometimes reproducible (50%+)
- [ ] Rarely reproducible (<50%)
- [ ] Unable to reproduce
